entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop cultivated in winter season in Gujarat and Maharashtra, India, known for food and fodder value and water-use efficiency

entities.name: WINTER SEASON
entities.description: The rabi season characterized by cool temperatures

entities.name: JUNAGADH
entities.description: A city/region in Gujarat, India, where pearl millet case studies were conducted

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: A state in India where pearl millet cultivation was studied

entities.name: JALGAON
entities.description: A city/region in Maharashtra, India, where pearl millet case studies were conducted

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where pearl millet cultivation was studied

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the case studies were conducted

entities.name: FOOD AND FODDER
entities.description: Nutritious requirements for farmers' households provided by pearl millet

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental constraint of 10–15°C that affects plant growth and yield

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The developmental progress of the plant, reduced by low temperatures

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The stage of full development of the plant, delayed by low temperatures

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced, reduced by low temperatures

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup that can be used to address temperature constraints

entities.name: ADJUSTING SOWING TIME
entities.description: A farmer practice used to overcome poor seed setting caused by low temperature

entities.name: SEED SETTING
entities.description: The process of seed formation, which can be poor under low temperature conditions

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing traits to allow for flexible sowing times

entities.name: CULTURAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices employed to increase economic benefits

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: A specific cultural management practice involving alternating crops

entities.name: CROPPING CALENDAR
entities.description: A scheduled plan for cropping used to optimize yields

entities.name: BENEFIT-COST RATIO
entities.description: An economic indicator of the profitability of pearl millet cultivation

entities.name: WATER-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of the crop to produce biomass per unit of water used

entities.name: WATER LIMITING ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments with scarce water availability where pearl millet performs well

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The global shift in climate patterns making pearl millet a potential replacement crop

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Cross-bred varieties developed to be suited for winter season environments
